bot.deskripsi: NEOXR AI adalah WhatsApp bot multifungsi yang dirancang untuk membantu aktivitas harian, mulai dari download media, chat dengan AI, membuat sticker, hingga mengelola grup secara otomatis. Dibangun dengan performa tinggi dan respon cepat, NEOXR AI siap menjadi asisten digital terbaikmu di WhatsApp.
bot.deskripsi_en: NEOXR AI is a multifunctional WhatsApp bot designed to help with daily activities, from downloading media and chatting with AI to making stickers and managing groups automatically. Built for high performance and fast responses, NEOXR AI is ready to be your best digital assistant on WhatsApp.

faq.jawaban: NEOXR AI adalah WhatsApp bot berbasis AI yang menyediakan berbagai fitur seperti downloader, sticker maker, AI chat, game, dan tools grup untuk memudahkan aktivitas kamu di WhatsApp.
faq.jawaban_en: NEOXR AI is an AI-based WhatsApp bot that provides various features such as a downloader, sticker maker, AI chat, games, and group tools to make your activities on WhatsApp easier.

faq.pertanyaan_en: How do I use this bot?
faq.jawaban: Kamu cukup menyewa paket BASIC atau VIP, lalu bot akan aktif secara otomatis di nomor WhatsApp yang kamu daftarkan sesuai durasi paket.
faq.jawaban_en: Simply rent a BASIC or VIP package, and the bot will automatically activate on the WhatsApp number you register for the duration of the package.

faq.pertanyaan_en: Is this bot safe to use?
faq.jawaban: Ya, NEOXR AI dijamin aman digunakan selama mengikuti ketentuan penggunaan dan tidak melakukan spam atau pelanggaran kebijakan WhatsApp.
faq.jawaban_en: Yes, NEOXR AI is guaranteed safe to use as long as you follow the terms of use and do not spam or violate WhatsApp's policies.

faq.pertanyaan: Metode pembayaran apa saja yang tersedia?
faq.jawaban: Kami menerima pembayaran melalui Dana, OVO, GoPay, dan QRIS untuk memudahkan transaksi kamu.
faq.jawaban_en: We accept payments via Dana, OVO, GoPay, and QRIS to make your transactions easier.

faq.pertanyaan: Apakah ada garansi jika bot error?
faq.pertanyaan_en: Is there a guarantee if the bot has an error?
faq.jawaban: Selama masa aktif sewa, kendala teknis akan ditangani langsung oleh owner tanpa biaya tambahan.
faq.jawaban_en: During the active rental period, technical issues will be handled directly by the owner at no additional cost.

faq.pertanyaan_en: How do I contact the owner?
faq.jawaban: Kamu bisa menghubungi owner langsung melalui tombol WhatsApp yang tersedia di halaman Owner.
faq.jawaban_en: You can contact the owner directly through the WhatsApp button available on the Owner page.

owner.deskripsi: DIKZZ adalah developer dan pengelola utama NEOXR AI. Berpengalaman dalam membangun sistem bot WhatsApp yang stabil dan responsif, DIKZZ berkomitmen memberikan layanan terbaik serta dukungan penuh kepada seluruh pengguna NEOXR AI.
owner.deskripsi_en: DIKZZ is the developer and main manager of NEOXR AI. Experienced in building stable and responsive WhatsApp bot systems, DIKZZ is committed to providing the best service and full support to all NEOXR AI users.

pengumuman.paragraf1: Karena adanya kenaikan kurs dolar yang cukup signifikan beberapa waktu terakhir, kami terpaksa menyesuaikan harga beberapa paket dan layanan mulai hari ini.
pengumuman.paragraf1_en: Due to a significant recent increase in the dollar exchange rate, we are forced to adjust the prices of several packages and services starting today.
pengumuman.paragraf2: Beberapa paket BASIC & VIP mengalami penyesuaian harga. Disarankan mengambil paket 2 bulan ke atas karena jauh lebih hemat.
pengumuman.paragraf2_en: Several BASIC & VIP packages have had their prices adjusted. We recommend taking a package of 2 months or more since it's much more economical.
catatan: Harga lama masih berlaku untuk pembayaran yang sudah dilakukan sebelum pengumuman ini.
Kenaikan ini murni akibat fluktuasi kurs dolar terhadap Rupiah.
Kami berusaha menekan kenaikan seminimal mungkin agar tetap terjangkau.
Terima kasih banyak atas pengertian dan dukungannya.
catatan_en: The old price is still valid for payments made before this announcement.
This increase is purely due to fluctuations in the dollar exchange rate against the Rupiah.
We are trying to keep the increase as minimal as possible to stay affordable.
Thank you very much for your understanding and support.
